name: Hagerty, Inc.
business: Hagerty, Inc. is a market leader in providing insurance for collector cars and enthusiast vehicles, complemented by membership products, car events, media, and a marketplace for buying and selling vehicles. The company offers Guaranteed Value insurance policies and operates as a Managing General Agent, reinsuring a portion of the risk through its subsidiary Hagerty Re. Its integrated ecosystem aims to serve the automotive enthusiast community.

exposures.sentence: We are a market leader in providing insurance for collector cars and enthusiast vehicles, helping the automotive enthusiast community protect and enjoy their special cars for more than 40 years.
We also operate a trusted marketplace where collectors and enthusiasts can buy and sell a wide range of vehicles, from entry level enthusiast vehicles to high value collector cars.
Our insurance products are complemented by our membership product, Hagerty Drivers Club ("HDC"), our renowned car events, and our media and entertainment platforms.

catalysts.sentence: On December 31, 2025, we entered into new contractual arrangements and amended the terms of our existing contractual arrangements with Markel and its affiliates. These coordinated transactions with Markel formed an arrangement that became effective January 1, 2026 (the "Markel Fronting Arrangement").

catalysts.event: Enthusiast+ nationwide rollout over next four years
catalysts.sentence: We plan to implement a phased, nationwide rollout of Enthusiast+ over the next four years.
In 2026, Broad Arrow expects to further expand its auction calendar.

catalysts.event: Broad Arrow's inaugural European auctions in 2025
catalysts.sentence: During 2025, Broad Arrow expanded its live auction and private sale offerings in the EMEA region.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. target market of collector cars and enthusiast vehicles represents approximately $15 billion of annual written premium based on average vehicle premium of $423 per year.
tamClaims.sentence: On this basis, we estimate that our U.S. target market of collector cars and enthusiast vehicles represents approximately $15 billion of annual written premium based on our average vehicle premium of $423 per year.
